creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a port of 3-Dimensional Chess for X Window System.

Three boards, 96 pieces and 26 directions. 3Dc is played with
three chess boards arranged one above another.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	3Dc-0.8.1
#	3Dc-0.8.1/Makefile
#	3Dc-0.8.1/files
#	3Dc-0.8.1/files/md5
#	3Dc-0.8.1/patches
#	3Dc-0.8.1/patches/patch-aa
#	3Dc-0.8.1/pkg
#	3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/PLIST
#	3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/COMMENT
#	3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/DESCR
#
echo c - 3Dc-0.8.1
mkdir -p 3Dc-0.8.1 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - 3Dc-0.8.1/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >3Dc-0.8.1/Makefile << 'END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	3Dc
X# Version required:			0.8.1
X# Date created:				2 May 1998
X# Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=		3Dc-0.8.1
XCATEGORIES=		games x11
XMASTER_SITES=		${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	games/strategy
X
XMAINTAINER=		andy@icc.surw.chel.su
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=		Xpm\\.4\\.:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/xpm \
X			Xaw3d\\.6\\.:${PORTSDIR}/x11/Xaw3d
X
XUSE_X11=		yes
XWRKSRC=			${WRKDIR}/3Dc
X
Xdo-build:
X	@ cd ${WRKSRC}/src; make
X
Xdo-install:
X	@ ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/src/3Dc ${PREFIX}/bin
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/3Dc
X.for file in 3Dc-rules.html ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS GPL README TODO
X	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/3Dc
X.endfor
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/Makefile
echo c - 3Dc-0.8.1/files
mkdir -p 3Dc-0.8.1/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - 3Dc-0.8.1/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >3Dc-0.8.1/files/md5 << 'END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/files/md5'
XMD5 (3Dc-0.8.1.tar.gz) = 9f577656749a4b67d8ff6b5283fdfe5f
END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/files/md5
echo c - 3Dc-0.8.1/patches
mkdir -p 3Dc-0.8.1/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - 3Dc-0.8.1/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >3Dc-0.8.1/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/patches/patch-aa'
X--- src/Makefile	Thu Apr 11 14:23:53 1996
X+++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/src/Makefile	Sat May  2 10:11:07 1998
X@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
X # If your system doesn't have a unique define already, define one here.
X 
X # Linux
X-CONFIGS=-DHAVE_UNISTD_H -DHAVE_ULIMIT_H
X+CONFIGS=-DHAVE_UNISTD_H
X # OSF/Digital Unix/HPUX
X #CONFIGS=-fPIC -DHAVE_UNISTD_H -DHAVE_ULIMIT_H
X # Sun
X@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@
X DEBUG=
X COPTIONS=-O2 -fstrength-reduce -fpcc-struct-return -DVERSION=\"${VERSION}\"
X 
X-CFLAGS=${COPTIONS} ${DEBUG} ${CONFIGS} ${PREFS} -I../include
X+CFLAGS=${COPTIONS} ${DEBUG} ${CONFIGS} ${PREFS} -I../include -I${X11BASE}/include
X LDOPTIONS=
X 
X # LDLIBS should include the name of your X library path if not /usr/lib;
END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/patches/patch-aa
echo c - 3Dc-0.8.1/pkg
mkdir -p 3Dc-0.8.1/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - 3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/3Dc
Xshare/doc/3Dc/3Dc-rules.html
Xshare/doc/3Dc/ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS
Xshare/doc/3Dc/GPL
Xshare/doc/3Dc/README
Xshare/doc/3Dc/TODO
X@dirrm share/doc/3Dc
END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/PLIST
echo x - 3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/COMMENT'
X3-Dimensional Chess for X Window System.
END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - 3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/DESCR'
X3-Dimensional Chess for X. Three boards, 96 pieces and 26 directions.
X3Dc is played with three chess boards arranged one above another.
END-of-3Dc-0.8.1/pkg/DESCR
exit

Fix: 

Please, check and commit this port.
